title: Patagonia
tagline: Activist plainspoken, photographic density. Refresh tightens commerce-density to balanced and fixes a single-CTA-verb fatigue without softening the voice.

direction.phrase: Brand-faithful Mode A presales refresh. Palette and typography pinned. Three variants: A conservative, B compositional, C bold.
movements: type-scale: ad-hoc → modular ladder anchored to captured Ridgeway sizes

originalCritique: The brand voice is one of the strongest in the category — plainspoken, declarative, activist — and the photography is genuinely documentary, not catalog. The composition lets it down: hero text floats on photos without scrim, the type scale is ad-hoc, and "Shop" repeats as the verb on every CTA so action collapses into one undifferentiated motion. The page makes activist photography read like seasonal merch.

variants.name: Conservative refresh
variants.thesis: Same IA, same section order, every token refined. Balanced 64/48/32 density. Modular ladder anchored to captured Ridgeway sizes. Hero scrim. Action-specific CTA verbs.
variants.fix: Same IA, same section order. Every token refined under the captured composition. Balanced 64/48/32 density (tighter than editorial defaults — the brand's actual register). Modular ladder anchored to the captured Ridgeway sizes. Hero scrim guaranteed. "Shop" replaced by action-specific verbs (Read · Repair · Trade in · Donate · Shop). The voice and the page finally agree.

variants.name: Compositional shift
variants.thesis: Same palette, type, photography. Different homepage thesis: open with a single activist story (a film, an essay, a campaign), commerce follows below the fold. The brand's stated priority finally read as the page's priority.
variants.fix: Same palette, type, photography. Different homepage thesis: the page opens with a single activist story — a film, an essay, a campaign — full-bleed, declarative copy, no SKU. Commerce follows below the fold as supporting surface, not primary. The brand says it's an activist company; the home finally lets activism go first.

variants.name: Bold direction
variants.thesis: Push the eggplant. The captured #500778 utility ribbon becomes a primary section ground for one band — a manifesto moment in the brand's signature color. Everything else stays restrained.
variants.fix: Push the eggplant. The captured #500778 utility ribbon becomes a primary section ground for one band — a manifesto moment in the brand's signature color. The rest of the page stays restrained: same Ridgeway, same documentary photography, same commerce density. The eggplant finally carries something other than "member sign-in".
